questionHtml:
Three statements about Newton’s law of gravitation are:

I.   It can be used to predict the motion of a satellite.
II.  It explains why gravity exists.
III. It is used to derive the expression for gravitational potential energy.

Which combination of statements is correct?

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: Three statements about Newton’s law of gravitation are: I. It can be used to predict the motion of a satellite.II. It explains why gravity exists.III. It is used to derive the expr
